title: Hardcore Ore Generation
description: Reduces the amount of ores in veins to 25% of the normal amount.
body:
🪨 Hardcore Ore Generation

> Ready to turn up the challenge? Hardcore Ore Generation drastically reduces ore vein sizes to just 25% of their normal amount, making every diamond, iron, and resource-rich discovery feel earned.

> This mod is perfect for players who love survival realism, resource management, and the thrill of exploration. Whether you're running a hardcore world or just want to make progression more meaningful, this mod makes mining a true adventure.

🔥 Key Feature
- Ore veins generate with only a quarter of their usual yield

🛠️ Best Used With
- Survival challenge modpacks, hardcore playthroughs, or minimalist gameplay styles

💡 Pro Tip

- Pair with cave mods or terrain generation overhauls for an even more intense experience.
